latin: Cum monstrum immane urbem delere coepisset, speciem cibi cepit: placentae hominis forma. unus ex venatoribus spiritorum dixit: 'nemo contra placentam pugnare vult.'

questions.prompt: What form did the monster take?

questions.target: A city-destroying monster looks like a friendly food mascot
choices: A city-destroying monster looks like a friendly food mascot

translation: When an enormous monster had begun to destroy the city, it took the appearance of food: the form of a marshmallow man. One of the ghost hunters said: 'Nobody wants to fight a marshmallow.'
